/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/trajectory_editor.dir/trajectory_editor_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trajectory_editor.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trajectory_editor.dir/src/core/trajectory_data.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trajectory_editor.dir/src/core/edit_history.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trajectory_editor.dir/src/core/track_boundaries.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trajectory_editor.dir/src/utils/csv_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trajectory_editor.dir/src/gui/graphics_trajectory_view.cpp.o -o trajectory_editor  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.15.3
